plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Project-management scaffold + session and delivery skills. /pm:scaffold starts a client engagement; whats-next, stepping-away, design-handoff, and html-artifacts support the work.

plugins.name: fm-dc
plugins.description: Agentic FileMaker development: SaXML patching with verify/rollback, DDR analysis, snippet validation, ProofKit and server-connection doctrine, and project scaffolding. Commands /fm-dc:fm-init, fm-scaffold, fm-status, fm-rollback, fm-docs-sync.
